case_title: POLISHOOK ROCHELLE DBA WESCO ADVERTISING VS SCOENHOEFT CHARLES DBA TRANSPHERE INTERNATIONAL et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POLISHOOK ROCHELLE DBA WESCO ADVERTISING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCOENHOEFT CHARLES DBA TRANSPHERE INTERNATIONAL $2,277.53 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,277.53, THE COURT FINDS THAT THE BATS WERE OF SUB-STANDARD QUALITY AND THEREFORE A BREACH OF CONTRACT BETWEEN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
RETURNED TO CT CLERK FOR TYPING OF OTHER ORDERS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GRANNAWAY PAYTON DBA ANTHEM ELECTRONICS INC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,555.06 FILED BY POLISHOOK ROCHELLE DBA WESCO ADVERTISING AS TO DEFENDANT SCOENHOEFT CHARLES DBA TRANSPHERE INTERNATIONAL GRANNAWAY PAYTON DBA ANTHEM ELECTRONICS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO CHARLES SCHOENHOEFT (TRANSPHERE INT'L) RETURNED NOT SIGNED BY ADDRESSEE.
